channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Limited-Time Discount: Bring a Colleague to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 and Save 50% on a Second Pass
item.description: TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 is offering a limited-time promotion for attendees: buy one pass and get 50% off a second pass of the same ticket type. This offer is valid from May 4 to May 8, 2026, encouragi...

item.title: Mexico's 2026-2030 Connectivity Plan: Combining 5G, Satellites, and Local Operators to Expand Internet Access
item.description: Mexico's National Connectivity Plan 2026-2030 aims to increase nationwide internet coverage from 94% to 98% by 2030, reaching over 1.4 million additional people, with special focus on vulnerable areas...

item.title: ASIC launches insider trading investigation into Accent Group and its CEO Daniel Agostinelli
item.description: Accent Group, the major Australian sporting and footwear retailer behind popular chains such as Platypus and Hype DC, is currently under scrutiny from the Australian Securities and Investments Commiss...

item.title: DOJ clarifies Comey indictment involves multiple matters beyond Instagram post
item.description: On May 4, 2026, the Acting Attorney General emphasized that the indictment of former FBI Director James Comey encompasses more than just a single Instagram photo, clarifying public misconceptions. The...

item.title: LTFRB Calls Out Bus Operators for Violating Fare Discount Policies
item.description: The Land Transportation Franchising and Regulatory Board (LTFRB) has summoned several bus operators for not complying with fare discount regulations. The LTFRB action follows complaints from the publi...

item.title: Modi's BJP Takes Lead in West Bengal Amidst Tight State Elections
item.description: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) appears to be on course for a historic win in West Bengal, a state long dominated by the opposition All India Trinamool Congress (TMC...

item.title: Meghan Markle attends godson's First Communion in Chicago
item.description: Meghan Markle travelled solo to Chicago over the weekend to attend the First Communion of her godson, the child of a close friend from her time at Northwestern University. Sources confirm that the Duc...

item.title: NDMA issues nationwide alert for thunderstorms, hail, and strong winds
item.description: The National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA) has issued a nationwide alert warning people of thunderstorms, rain, and possible hail across multiple regions of Pakistan in the next 12 to 24 hours....

item.title: Tanzania and Kenya Collaborate on Rail and Power Integration for Regional Growth
item.description: Tanzania and Kenya are pushing forward with plans to reconnect their railway networks and expand electricity interconnections, aiming to boost trade and industrial growth in the region. During the Tan...

item.title: Roselina Muhagachi shares her journey overcoming abuse and rebuilding life after divorce
item.description: After her marriage ended, Roselina Muhagachi has spent several years working hard to rebuild her life while dealing with the emotional and social impact of online abuse and domestic violence. She expl...

item.title: Civil Aviation Authority Confirms Eastern Samar Airports Safe After 6.1-Magnitude Earthquake
item.description: The Civil Aviation Authority of the Philippines (CAAP) reported that there is no damage to airports following the 6.1-magnitude earthquake that struck Eastern Samar on May 4, 2026. Authorities quickly...

item.title: Oburu Oginga Absent from ODM Retreat, Emphasises Unity and Fair Competition
item.description: ODM party leader Oburu Oginga was unable to attend the party retreat in Mombasa on Monday, May 4, which brought together the national executive council, council of governors, MPs, trustees, and other ...

item.title: Minors Trespass into NYC Scientology Building, Cause Damage and Injure Staff
item.description: On Saturday afternoon, a group of teenagers forced their way into a Church of Scientology building in New York City, located near Times Square. The NYPD reported the incident occurred at around 4:24 P...

item.title: Recent Earthquakes Highlight Nevada’s Seismic Risks Near Reno and Las Vegas
item.description: Nevada has experienced a series of recent earthquakes that, while not causing major damage, underscore the state’s hidden seismic risks. On April 13, a magnitude 5.7 earthquake struck 45 miles east of...

item.title: Live Updates on 2026 By-Election Results Across Seven Constituencies
item.description: The news article was intended to provide live updates on the 2026 by-election results for seven constituencies: Baramati, Rahuri, Bagalkot, Dharmanagar, Umreth, Koridang, and Davanagere South. However...

item.title: How decluttering before a move can save money and reduce stress
item.description: Moving house can be stressful and costly, but decluttering beforehand can save both time and money. Australian households are increasingly cluttered, with one in four reporting more items than five ye...

item.title: Swiss businessman Marc Rieben stands trial for the murder of his wife Kristina Joksimovic
item.description: A 43-year-old Swiss businessman named Marc Rieben has gone on trial in Muttenz, near Basel, accused of murdering his 38-year-old wife, Kristina Joksimovic, a former Miss Switzerland finalist, in Febru...

item.title: Assam Assembly Election Updates: BJP Leading, Himanta Biswa Sarma Ahead in Jalukbari, Gaurav Gogoi Loses in Jorhat
item.description: Counting of votes for the 2026 Assam Assembly elections is underway with significant leads reported in several constituencies. Assam Chief Minister and Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) leader Himanta Bisw...

item.title: P.E.I. oyster industry turns to U.S. disease-resistant seed to recover from mass die-off
item.description: Prince Edward Island’s oyster industry is attempting to recover from a severe crisis caused by two diseases, MSX and dermo, which have led to widespread oyster mortality across the province. In respon...

item.title: Bandits Kill 11 People In Retaliation Attack In Katsina Villages
item.description: On Sunday, for Kankia Local Government Area, Katsina State, no fewer than eleven people lost their lives after bandits carried out reprisal attacks on Jeka da Kolo and Kwalgoro villages. Police say th...
